name: 影分身定身
skillCode: var clone = context.rulePiece; if (!clone || clone.currentHp <= 0) return { success: false, message: '' }; if (!context.piece || context.piece.instanceId !== clone.instanceId) return { success: false, message: '' }; var tag = clone.statusTags && clone.statusTags.find(function(t) { return t.type === 'naruto-clone'; }); if (!tag) { removeRuleById(clone.instanceId, 'rule-naruto-clone-immobile'); return { success: false, message: '' }; } return { success: true, blocked: true, message: '影分身无法移动' };
